requirements.label: source reproducibility gate is present and bounded
requirements.missing_to_promote: Keep the contract tied to the failed T-B6-004 gate.

requirements.label: table size and holdout scope are contract-ready
requirements.missing_to_promote: Preserve the same audited B6 crystallographic row scope.

requirements.label: forbidden discovery and mechanism claims are absent
requirements.missing_to_promote: Keep all claims bounded until reproducibility, baselines, and observables pass.

requirements.label: reproducible crystallographic backend is available
requirements.missing_to_promote: Pin pymatgen or an equivalent descriptor backend with deterministic version metadata.

requirements.label: source validation blockers are removed
requirements.missing_to_promote: Remove source validation blockers and rerun the crystallographic screen.

requirements.label: post-split crystallographic AP beats family prior
requirements.missing_to_promote: Beat the family-prior denominator on the post-split holdout.

requirements.label: DFT observable channel is attached
requirements.missing_to_promote: Attach computed DFT observables or keep the descriptor as non-DFT proxy evidence.

requirements.label: B5 computed observable channel is attached
requirements.missing_to_promote: Attach B5-computed response observables or keep B6 disconnected from B5 mechanisms.
